nasb.text: the Babylonians and all the Chaldeans, Pekod and Shoa and Koa, and all the Assyrians with them; desirable young men, governors and officials all of them, officers and men of renown, all of them riding on horses.

esv.text: the Babylonians and all the Chaldeans, Pekod and Shoa and Koa, and all the Assyrians with them, desirable young men, governors and commanders all of them, officers and men of renown, all of them riding on horses.

cnv.text: 他們就是巴比倫人、迦勒底人、比割人、書亞人、哥亞人，與他們一起的還有亞述人，他們都是英俊的年輕人，是作總督和省長的，作長官和戰士的，全部都是騎馬的。

ccb.text: 他们是巴比伦人，还有从比割、书亚和哥亚来的迦勒底人以及亚述人，都是骑马的省长和总督及年轻英俊的有名将领。
